parsed.production_notes: The video consists of a digital app screencast paired with AI-generated text-to-speech voiceovers. The voices exhibit unnatural, monotonous intonation and pacing typical of AI generation, while the visuals are standard UI recordings.

characters.appearance: Young South Asian woman, fair complexion, long dark hair. She has a pleasant, approachable face.
Young South Asian man, fair complexion, dark wavy hair. He has a clean-shaven, youthful face.
characters.demeanor: Neutral with a slight, confident smile.

scenes.setting: Abstract digital space, purple color palette.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smooth, abstract gradient background transitioning from dark purple at the top to a lighter lavender at the bottom. Two circular portrait photos are positioned side-by-side in the upper half. The left portrait shows Character A, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white top. The right portrait shows Character B, a young man with dark wavy hair wearing a dark shirt.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile app interface showing an active audio call. Two circular profile pictures of a young woman and a young man are displayed at the top against a purple gradient background. Below them is a green banner and a call timer counting down. At the bottom are three circular buttons for Mute, Speaker, and End call. A recording notification appears briefly at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: நீங்க இத ஆரம்பிச்சு எத்தன நாள் ஆச்சு? [How many days has it been since you started this?]
Character B says: ஒரு பத்து முதல் பன்னிரண்டு நாள் இருக்கும். [It would be about ten to twelve days.]
Character A says: அப்போ இப்போ ஏதாச்சும் மாற்றம் தெரியுதா? [So, do you see any difference now?]
Character B says: ஆமா, I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I speak English very confidently now.]
Character A says: ஓஹோ, இப்போ சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுறீங்களே. [Oho, you are speaking English superbly now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments.

scenes.setting: Digital interface backgrounds, transitioning from white to dark blue.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background that later transitions to a dark blue background. In the dark blue setting, a glowing, circular 3D podium sits in the center. The podium features a metallic rim and emits a soft, neon blue light from its base, creating a spotlight effect.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with a Google Play Store app listing for 'MySivi AI Speak English' showing the app icon, title, and an 'Install' button. It then cuts to a dark blue promotional screen for 'MySivi Premium'. A large glowing podium is in the center with a '₹1' offer displayed prominently. Various features and a '1,200 learners purchased today' banner are shown below.

Unknown speaker says: நீங்களும் இன்னைக்கே ஆரம்பிங்க. [You too start today.]
Unknown speaker says: ட்ரையல் வெறும் ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு மட்டும்தான். [Trial is for just one rupee.]
